text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross is a pint-sized Umamusume hailing
from Naniwa. Despite her underprivileged
beginnings, she strives to succeed for the sake of
her family. Together, we're about to take on the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We try our hand at a scrimmage first, but
although she prides herself on her final-stretch
sprinting—also the source of her "White
Lightning" nickname—she struggles to break
through the pack of bigger racers...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's upset by her loss, but as always, the
kindhearted Super Creek is there to smother her
with reassurance and love.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Tamamo Cross rebuffs her coddling,
demanding to be treated like an adult. She
dashes off, and our race to save her family from
poverty begins!
